No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's unopposed discovery motion is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers.

Defendant Tracy Dearman is ordered to respond to the following discovery within two weeks of notice of entry of this order: (1) Special Interrogatories, Set One; (2) Special Interrogatories, Set Two; (3) Form Interrogatories Set Two; (4) Requests for Production Set Two; and (5) Form Interrogatories Set Three.

Defendant TCGSF, Inc. is ordered to respond to the following discovery within two weeks of notice of entry of this order: (1) Special Interrogatories, Set One; and (2) Form Interrogatories Set Two.

Requests for Admission to Dearman, sets two and three, are deemed admitted by Dearman. Requests for Admission to TCGSF, set two, are deemed admitted by TCGSF.

Sanctions are mandatory here. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2033.280, subd. (c).) The court orders TCGSF and Dearman jointly and severally to pay $2784.50 to Plaintiff within 30 days of notice of entry of this order.

Proposed order submitted. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
